data.body: Take and scene terminal sessions must never use one-shot cli-arg agent execution. Remove or guard any branch where a normal knot take or scene dispatch with a supported interactive CLI can fall back to one-shot mode, including custom prompt harness paths. Fail loudly if a take/scene target resolves to a non-interactive prompt transport instead of silently running opencode run or codex exec.
data.title: Forbid one-shot take and scene dispatch
